Browse Panels — independent colors
Independent BG / Text / Accent for the Spell Detail / Browser modals and the Gear catalog overlay. Each slider is fully independent — a blank input falls back to the main theme. Tip: if you change Text, also pick a contrasting BG so they don't blend.
